title: Completion Evidence
description: Schema-kind #3: harness execution state. Evidence is pointer-based to avoid token burn: store command/status/timestamps/hashes and repo-relative paths to logs, screenshots, diffs, or review notes. Do not paste full logs into this JSON. A feature is only done when every item is satisfied=true.

id.description: Matches an acceptance_criteria id or an evidence_required kind.

detail.description: What was checked, e.g. 'npm run verify (erd-parity)'.

summary.description: Short human-readable result summary. Keep this brief; put full detail in a pointed artifact.

command.description: Command that produced this evidence, for kind=command.

cwd.description: Repo-relative working directory for the command.

logPath.description: Repo-relative path to full command log under .spec/evidence/.

artifactPath.description: Repo-relative path to screenshot, diff, report, trace, or generated artifact.

reviewPath.description: Repo-relative path to a review note, if this is manual/review evidence.

url.description: External URL pointer, e.g. CI run or PR check, if applicable.

artifactHash.description: sha256 hash of the pointed artifact/log when available, formatted as sha256:<hex>.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA or working tree marker associated with the evidence.

model.description: Model used by the agent, if relevant.

reviewer.description: Human or role reviewer, for review evidence.

failureReason.description: Required when satisfied=false and useful for triage.

complete.description: True only when every item.satisfied is true. The completion gate.
